name: Fig Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, lemon peel, and vanilla extract to the butter mixture. Beat well until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just incorporated.
5. Stir in the chopped dried figs.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
8. Turn off the oven's heat source.
9. Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan before cutting into individual serving pieces.
Makes 32 bars.
